## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Contract impact

- [ ] No contract or deployment change
- [ ] Contract/deployment changes are documented and tested

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no secrets or local environment files
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation are updated where needed
